title: Unity Open MCP skill client-paths manifest
description: Single source of truth for project-relative agent-skill install paths and the MCP-client to skill-target mapping. Read by the Hub wizard and unity_agent_generate_skill.

skillId.description: Stable skill identifier used by clients to namespace the skill directory.

templateRelativePath.description: Path of the template SKILL.md relative to the toolkit root.

description.description: Free-form note for maintainers (not consumed by tooling).

clients.description: Map of client key to project-relative install metadata. Keys are the canonical client identifiers also used by unity_agent_generate_skill's `clients` parameter.

relativePath.description: Project-relative path the skill template is copied to (forward slashes).

mcpClientMapping.description: Map of MCP client identifier (mirrors the Hub McpClientId vocabulary) to one or more client keys from `clients`. Used by the Hub wizard to derive skill targets from the selected MCP client.

additionalProperties.description: Client keys from `clients` that this MCP client maps to.
